sizing_rule.note: Position size = 1 contract per $7,936.41 account equity when optimal f = 0.837. Trade only if no loss exceeds 4 sigmas ($330.13 in example). Formula: Contracts = Account Equity / (1 / optimal_f). Bounding constraint prevents violation of parametric limits.

source_rule_text: Position size based on optimal f parameter: trade 1 contract per $7,936.41 of account equity when optimal f equals .837, provided selected bounding parameters are not violated.
